title: daphne baimashanensis subsp. lungtzeensis
intro: Daphne baimashanensis subsp. lungtzeensis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, also known as the daphne family. It is a shrub native to Yunnan province in China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Daphne baimashanensis subsp. lungtzeensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
